title: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]35[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!
options.requires: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

conditions: Each player must have at least 105 Gold to encounter
notes:
[gold]Event Flow[/gold]
The Endless Conveyor is a looping feast event. You enter a shack with a chef placing dishes on a chitinous conveyor belt. The initial state offers two choices: grab the current dish or [gold]Observe the Chef[/gold]. If you grab, you pay 35 Gold (except for the lucky Golden Fysh), trigger the dish's effect, and face a new dish. You can keep grabbing or [gold]Leave[/gold]. Observing the Chef upgrades a single random card in your deck and immediately ends the event.

[gold]Weighted Dish Selection[/gold]
Each grab (except the 5th, 10th, etc.) randomly selects from a weighted pool:
- [blue]Caviar[/blue] (weight 6): Always available
- [blue]Spicy Snappy[/blue] (weight 3): Always available
- [blue]Jelly Liver[/blue] (weight 3): Always available
- [blue]Fried Eel[/blue] (weight 3): Always available
- [blue]Suspicious Condiment[/blue] (weight 3): Only if you have open [gold]Potion[/gold] slots
- [blue]Clam Roll[/blue] (weight 6): Only if you're not at maximum HP
- [blue]Golden Fysh[/blue] (weight 1): Only available after the first grab; costs no Gold and gives 75 instead
- [blue]Seapunk Salad[/blue]: Guaranteed on every 5th grab (grabs 5, 10, 15, etc.), overriding randomness

[gold]Important Details[/gold]
- The same dish never appears twice consecutively—if you just grabbed a dish, it won't appear as the next option
- If you lack 35 Gold, the grab option becomes unavailable (shows as "Broke") and you must leave
- Golden Fysh is the only free dish and the only one that gives Gold back (75 per grab)
- Seapunk Salad adds [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your deck and still costs 35 Gold despite being guaranteed
